title: Italian Options Small Satin Ribbon Bows, Self Adhesive Bow Decorations for Crafts, Gift Wrap, Hampers, Hair Bows, Wedding Stationery, Floristry, Christmas, Cakes, Crafting, Sage Green, 12 Pack, 5 cm
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: Available in over 40 stunning pastel and bright shades, our elegant, perfectly tied, double-faced satin ribbon craft bows will elevate any craft project or gift wrap.

SMOOTH TEXTURE: Measuring 5 x 5 cm, these 16 mm non-fraying, small bows for crafting feature a beautiful, soft and smooth texture with a natural sheen. REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) & OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified for trusted safety & quality.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: Our self adhesive bows include a clear backing strip for easy application. Ideal for gift wrap, presents, card and paper crafts, chocolates, floristry, cake decorations, décor, scented candles, perfumes, wax melts & treat bags.

FOR EVERY OCCASION: Make every celebration unforgettable. Perfect for Christmas, weddings, baby and bridal showers, Easter, Valentine’s and birthday gifts, our premium bow decorations add a luxurious finishing touch.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
